name: Maxine Agassiz
title: The Renowned

abilities.name: Captain of the Superior
abilities.text: Once per activation. When an ally within 8" empowers a duel, the ally may gain a Voyage token.

abilities.name: Polymath
abilities.text: When this model activates, choose any suit for the value of X on this model's stat card.

abilities.name: Two Steps Ahead
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this crew's research bar is full, enemy attack actions that target this model reduce their Skl by 2.

actions.name: Crack the Formula
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model has fewer cards in its control hand than the target, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Abort the Trial
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Name a token. Remove the named token from all models within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Weaponised Semantics
triggers.text: Once per activation. The target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

actions.name: Course Correction
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5". Then, the target gains a Voyage token.

triggers.name: Race the Tide
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target gains a Fast token.

triggers.name: Learn by Example
triggers.text: Target may declare the Interact action.

extraction_notes: Keywords section appears to be empty - only characteristics shown before the bullet point
EVS appears in characteristics line - likely abbreviation for Explorer's Society
